title: How it all started
dek: 叩叩魔魔的故事从合肥开始，在武汉确定。Koko and Momo first met in Hefei on February 22, 2024, and officially became a couple in Wuhan on March 17, 2024.
narrative: It began in Hefei on February 22, 2024 — the first meeting.
Three weeks later in Wuhan, on March 16, they held hands for the first time. The next day, March 17, KoMo officially began.
mapCaption: 叩叩魔魔的故事从合肥开始。

title: Wuhan and Hefei revisited
dek: Returning to where it all began — Wuhan in May, Hefei in June.
narrative: In May 2024, KoMo returned to Wuhan, revisiting the city where they became a couple.
June brought them back to Hefei, the city where they first met.

title: First international adventure
dek: KoMo's first trip abroad together — Singapore in June 2024.
narrative: June 2024: KoMo traveled to Singapore for their first international adventure together.
A new city, new experiences, and memories beyond borders.

title: Beijing summer
dek: The first Beijing summer together — June through August 2024.
narrative: The summer of 2024 was spent in Beijing, from June through August.
Beijing became their summer base, a city that would welcome them back again and again.

title: Beijing, again and again
dek: Two Beijing stays in 2025 — March, then May through August.
narrative: In March 2025, KoMo was back in Beijing.
From May to August 2025, another extended summer in Beijing.

title: Momo comes to Koko
dek: 魔魔去美国看叩叩。In February 2026, Momo traveled to the US to visit Koko.
narrative: February 2026: Momo flew to the US to visit Koko — the first time together on Koko's side of the world.
After the visit, Momo returned to Beijing.
proofPoints: Momo visits Koko in the US: February 2026.
mapCaption: 魔魔去美国看叩叩，然后回到北京。

evidenceProfile.strength: First US visit, back to Beijing

title: Happily ever after
dek: 叩叩魔魔，永远在一起。Koko and Momo, together forever.
narrative: The future is full of adventures waiting to be discovered.
Traveling the world together, creating memories wherever they go, and building a lifetime of happiness.
proofPoints: Happy travels all over the world together.
